name: 智能告警修复-印尼-统一平台模板

parameters.command: ssh -p 36000 root@192.168.21.236 'cd /root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant && set -a && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && APP_COUNTRY='"'"'ine'"'"' APP_WORKSPACE='"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' TV_MENTIONS='"'"'gretchenhe@kn.group,riverzhai@kn.group'"'"' WORKFLOW_CODE_ROOT='"'"'/data/git/starrocks/workflow'"'"' WORKFLOW_CODE_COUNTRY='"'"'ine'"'"' python3 core/repair_strict_7step.py'
ssh -p 36000 root@192.168.21.236 'cd /root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant && git fetch origin && git reset --hard origin/master'

=ssh -p 36000 root@192.168.21.236 'cd /root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant && set -a && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && APP_COUNTRY='"'"'ine'"'"' APP_WORKSPACE='"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' TV_MENTIONS='"'"'gretchenhe@kn.group,riverzhai@kn.group'"'"' WORKFLOW_CODE_ROOT='"'"'/data/git/starrocks/workflow'"'"' WORKFLOW_CODE_COUNTRY='"'"'ine'"'"' python3 core/repair_strict_7step.py'

ssh -p 36000 root@192.168.21.236 'cd /root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant && set -a && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && APP_COUNTRY='"'"'ine'"'"' APP_WORKSPACE='"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' TV_MENTIONS='"'"'gretchenhe@kn.group,riverzhai@kn.group'"'"' WORKFLOW_CODE_ROOT='"'"'/data/git/starrocks/workflow'"'"' WORKFLOW_CODE_COUNTRY='"'"'ine'"'"' python3 tools/task_execution_checker.py --task repair'

ssh -p 36000 root@192.168.21.236 'cd /root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant && set -a && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && APP_COUNTRY='"'"'ine'"'"' APP_WORKSPACE='"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' TV_MENTIONS='"'"'gretchenhe@kn.group,riverzhai@kn.group'"'"' WORKFLOW_CODE_ROOT='"'"'/data/git/starrocks/workflow'"'"' WORKFLOW_CODE_COUNTRY='"'"'ine'"'"' python3 tools/task_execution_checker.py --task repair'

ssh -p 36000 root@192.168.21.236 "cd /root/INE-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant && BASE=\$(python3 -c 'from config import auto_load_env; from config.config import DS_CONFIG; print(DS_CONFIG[\"base_url\"].rstrip(\"/\"))') && TOKEN=\$(python3 -c 'from config import auto_load_env; from config.config import DS_CONFIG; print(DS_CONFIG[\"token\"])') && PROJECT=\$(python3 -c 'from config import auto_load_env; from config.config import DS_CONFIG; print(DS_CONFIG[\"project_code\"])') && curl -s \"\$BASE/projects/\$PROJECT/workflow-instances?pageNo=1&pageSize=200&stateType=ALL\" -H \"token: ${SECRET}" | python3 -c 'import sys,json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); items=data.get(\"data\",{}).get(\"totalList\",[]); hits=[x for x in items if str(x.get(\"workflowDefinitionCode\"))==\"13056261892672\"]; print(json.dumps(hits, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))'"
